payload.answer: Stored an event indicating the article fetch for the provided URL pattern failed with a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL appears malformed (contains unexpected punctuation/spacing), so it cannot be cleanly resolved to a canonical entity ID.

payload.intent: Extract atomic memory cards about an article fetch failure.

memory_cards.statement: A fetch attempt for an article at the (possibly malformed) URL resembling "https -//examplecom/missing" returned "404 network error".

details: Created 1 atomic memory card for the fetch failure.

repair_options: Remove the extra punctuation/spacing to form a canonical URL (e.g., "https://examplecom/missing").
Verify the intended hostname/path ("examplecom" vs "example.com", and exact "missing" route).
Retry the fetch with the corrected URL and confirm whether the error persists.
